name: Ferricream
description:
Name: Ferricream
Gender: Nonbinary feminine
Pronouns: She/her
Age: 20
Appearance: Cream coat, with frosting on her tummy with sprinkles. Her arms has the same frosting and sprinkles, but her wrist is rainbow. On her left hand, her paw pads has red, orange, and yellow, and on her right hand, her paw pads are green, blue, and purple.
Other patterns: She has a rainbow stripe on the inside of her ear along with frosting and sprinkles on the outside of her ear. Her tail has frosting and sprinkles on the top, but stripes on the bottom, each a separate color of the rainbow.
Clothing style: Her clothing style is EXTREMELY feminine. She tends to lean more on the Candycore side of things, but she'll buy pink cutecore clothes occasionally.
creator: skrinklydoo
